delta: add MASTER_HASH_COLUMNS dept (12th column); without it, dept changes won't update master record
body: PRD clean with 1 AC addition (MASTER_HASH_COLUMNS dept). maxClusterSize update is a quality-metric issue, not data-correctness — left out of prd.json. TRUST_HIERARCHY fix is critical and well-scoped; latent today because most attributes have only one non-null source, but Entra adds competing values for title/email/is_active.
